content: On September 8 and 9 (Bhadra 23 and 24), Janak Bhatta, P.A. to Home Minister Ramesh Lekhak, contacted Deputy Inspector General of Police (DIGP) Bishwo Adhikari on mobile number 9851205545 four times. Bishwo Adhikari also contacted Kathmandu's Chief District Officer (CDO) Chhabi Rijal once on September 9. Additionally, there were 23 mutual contacts between his mobile number and Major Ganesh Khadka of the Nepal Army on September 8 and 9.

On DIGP Bishwo Adhikari's other mobile number 9851280355, Sudan Gurung made contact twice on September 9. There were 53 mutual contacts with DIGP Om Rana on September 8 and 9, and 14 mutual contacts with Dan Bahadur Karki on the same dates. He had 4 mutual contacts with DSP Sundar Tiwari on September 9, and 42 mutual contacts with former IGP Chandra Kuber Khapung on September 8 and 9. Furthermore, he had 4 mutual contacts with Kathmandu CDO Chhabi Rijal on September 9, contacted Rajesh Bajracharya (P.A. to former PM K.P. Oli) once on September 9, and had 30 mutual contacts with AIGP Siddhi Bikram Shah on September 8 and 9.
According to the analysis of the mentioned charts, DIGP Bishwo Adhikari was in contact with various individuals on September 8 and 9.

content: On DIGP Om Rana's mobile number 9851280600, there were 11 mutual contacts with former IGP Chandra Kuber Khapung on September 8 and 9. He had 39 mutual contacts with AIGP Siddhi Bikram Shah and 53 mutual contacts with DIGP Bishwo Adhikari on September 8 and 9. Kathmandu CDO Chhabi Rijal contacted him once on September 8. He also had 22 mutual contacts with Dan Bahadur Karki on September 8 and 9, and 3 mutual contacts with Metro-1 on September 9.
According to the analysis of the mentioned charts, DIGP Om Rana maintained contact and coordination with various individuals on September 8 and 9.

12.6.2. BTS Data Analysis

Regarding the incidents of nationwide vandalism, arson, and physical damage to important government installations, offices, private residences, and commercial establishments on September 8 and 9, 2025 (Bhadra 23 and 24), a technical investigation was conducted on the mobile numbers (Cell ID) used by individuals present at the scenes. A Base Transceiver Station (BTS) analysis of these locations revealed the following established facts.

From the data requested across 15 districts, key sites of damage were selected, including government offices, private residences of political party leaders and heads, residences of then-ministers, private property of common citizens, and industrial/commercial establishments. A total of 174,420 mobile numbers from both service providers, NTC and NCELL, have been analyzed based on the data received so far. The table below mentions the total count of all data obtained to date.
/images/BTS of valley and valley out calls.png
alt: BTS of valley and valley out calls
caption: BTS of valley and valley out calls

content: NTC BTS (Government Offices within Kathmandu Valley)

An analysis of the Base Transceiver Stations (BTS) located near important government offices that were vandalized or set on fire within the Kathmandu Valley on September 8 (Parliament Building in Baneshwor) and September 9, 2025, shows that a total of 30,723 SIM users established contact with Nepal Telecom's core network through local towers. This means 30,723 Nepal Telecom users were present at those locations during the incident and established telephone contact through the NTC network.
/images/NTC governmant Office BTS(Valley).png
alt: NTC BTS Data of major locations vandalized/arsoned in districts outside the valley
caption: NTC BTS Data of major locations vandalized/arsoned in districts outside the valley

content: NCELL BTS (Government Offices within Kathmandu Valley)

An analysis of the BTS near important government offices vandalized or set on fire within the Kathmandu Valley on September 8 and 9, 2025, shows that a total of 12,538 SIM users established contact with NCELL's core network. This indicates that 12,538 NCELL users were present at the scene during the time of the incident and made telephone contacts through the NCELL network.
/images/NCELL governmant Office BTS(Valley).png
caption: NCELL governmant Office BTS(Valley)

content: NTC/NCELL BTS (Private Residences of Political Leaders and Heads)

Analysis of the BTS near the private residences of major political party leaders and heads vandalized or set on fire on September 9, 2025, within the Kathmandu Valley shows that a total of 8,598 SIM users established contact with the NTC/NCELL core networks. This means 8,598 users from both service providers were present at the locations mentioned in the table during the incident and made telephone contacts. This includes data from both providers.
/images/Politician Leaders Residences NTC and NCELL.png
alt: Politician Leaders Residences NTC and NCELL
caption: Politician Leaders Residences NTC and NCELL

content: NTC/NCELL BTS (Commercial Establishments and Private Residences of Business Houses)

Analysis of the BTS near important commercial establishments and private residences of business houses vandalized or set on fire on September 9, 2025, within the Kathmandu Valley shows that a total of 15,032 SIM users established contact with the NTC/NCELL core networks. This indicates that 15,032 users from both service providers were present at the sites mentioned in the table and made telephone calls during the incident.
/images/Industrial and Business Related Offices and Residences
alt: Industrial and Business Related Offices and Residences
caption: Industrial and Business Related Offices and Residences

content: NTC BTS (Important Government Installations, Offices, Private Homes, and Commercial Establishments in 11 Districts Outside the Valley)

Analysis of the BTS near important government installations, offices, private homes, and commercial establishments vandalized or set on fire on September 9, 2025, in 11 districts outside the Kathmandu Valley shows that a total of 68,317 SIM users established contact with the Nepal Telecom core network. This means 68,317 NTC users were present at the locations listed in the table and established telephone contact through the network during the incident.
/images/outside valley damages NTC data.png
alt: NTC BTS data of major locations vandalized/arsoned in districts outside the valley
caption: NTC BTS data of major locations vandalized/arsoned in districts outside the valley
